title: Simple Auto Fishing
description: A simple minecraft mod for automatic fishing
body: # [Simple-Auto-Fishing](https://github.com/Jan-Marvin/simple-auto-fishing) A minecraft mod for automatic fishing ## Controls: ``` Change mode: Sneak + Attack (while fishing rod is equipped in main hand) ``` Starting with Minecraft 1.21.11: ``` Change cast delay: /saf set (default 17) ``` Starting with Minecraft 26.1.2: ``` Toggle mod on/off: /saf toggle (default enabled) ``` ## Modes: ``` Mode 1 (Default) Use current Rod without break protection Mode 2 Use current Rod with break protection Mode 3 Use all Rods in hotbar without break protection ``` Starting with Minecraft 26.1.2: ``` Mode 4 Use all Rods in hotbar with break protection ```
